problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
